metadata.description: Optional. A unique application/solution name for all resources in this deployment.
Optional. A unique text suffix appended to resource names for uniqueness.
Optional. Primary Azure region for resource deployment. Defaults to resource group location.
Optional. Tags to apply to all resources.
Required. Location for AI Foundry and model deployments.
Optional. GPT model deployment type.
Optional. Name of the GPT model to deploy.
Optional. Version of the GPT model to deploy.
Optional. Capacity of the GPT deployment (TPM in thousands).

Optional. Capacity of the embedding model deployment.
Optional. Azure OpenAI API version.
Optional. Azure AI Agent API version.
Optional. Docker image tag for app deployments.
Optional. Name of the Azure Container Registry.
Optional. Backend runtime stack.
Optional. App Service Plan SKU.
Optional. Deploy the application components (Cosmos DB, API, Frontend).
Optional. Enable chat history storage.
Optional. Enable user access token forwarding to the API.
Optional. Set to true to auto-create a Fabric workspace during post-provision.
Optional. Name of an existing Fabric capacity to reuse. Empty auto-creates when conditions are met.
Optional. SKU tier of the Fabric capacity resource.
Optional. Additional user/service principal object IDs to assign as Fabric Capacity admins.
Optional. Resource ID of an existing Log Analytics workspace. Empty creates a new one.
Optional. Resource ID of an existing AI Foundry project. Empty creates a new one.
Optional. Principal type of the deploying user. Use ServicePrincipal for CI/CD pipelines with OIDC.
Optional. Primary title displayed in the header of the web app.
Optional. Secondary title displayed in the header of the web app.

variables.resourceTags: [union(variables('existingTags'), parameters('tags'), createObject('TemplateName', 'Unified Data Analysis Agents', 'CreatedBy', variables('createdBy'), 'DeploymentName', deployment().name, 'Type', 'Non-WAF'))]
